_comment: Maps hw_manufacturer + model patterns to a BIOS profile. Matched in order — first match wins. model_pattern is a PowerShell -like glob.

mappings.notes: root\WMI Lenovo_BIOSSetting confirmed on this line. BIOS prefix N40ET.
Live-probed 2026-06-19 on IMAGE-ME. BIOS R2DET41W. Full settings catalog in lenovo-thinkpad.json.
IdeaPad line. WMI availability unconfirmed — falls back to generic UEFI variable manipulation. BIOS prefix LHCN.
Default for any unmatched Lenovo — most Lenovo commercial hardware uses root\WMI.
Enterprise Dell. DellBIOSProvider module recommended (Install-Module DellBIOSProvider). Falls back to generic UEFI. CCTK not installed by default.
Consumer Dell. No CCTK. root\dcim\sysman accessible but DCIM_BIOSService absent on XPS 15 9570. Use DellBIOSProvider or generic UEFI.
HP Client Management Script Library (HPCMSL) recommended. Falls back to generic UEFI. BCU (BiosConfigUtility64.exe) also works if installed.
